positivePrompt: A woman stands before a roaring fire, admiring her hands and arms. As the flames grow brighter and brighter, her hair blazes with a fiery blue hue. Suddenly, she shifts into a new form, and her skin turns the same light blue as her hair. She smiles, content in this newfound state of being.
